basic_details.job_title: Uma UG Higher Secondary School Boudh Guest Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.organization_name: Uma UG Higher Secondary School, Boudh
basic_details.short_information: Uma UG Higher Secondary School, Boudh has released an official notification for the recruitment of Guest Faculty Posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply Offline by sending the application form to the official address. The last date to submit the application is 12-06-2026.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Maximum age limit for retired candidates is 65 years.

qualification.education_qualification: Master's degree in the concerned subject with at least 50% marks or equivalent grade, and B.Ed. or equivalent degree recognized by NCTE, New Delhi. Basic computer knowledge is also required.
qualification.details: Master's degree in the concerned subject with at least 50% marks or equivalent grade. B.Ed. or equivalent degree recognized by NCTE, New Delhi, in case of B.Ed. Subjects. Basic computer knowledge in commuter application-05, Teaching Experience -02 marks for each year max-10 marks.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 400/- per class/Lecture of 45 minutes duration subject to a ceiling of maximum 50 classes with rupees 20,000/- per month.
salary_details.details: Rs. 400/- per class/Lecture of 45 minutes duration subject to a ceiling of maximum 50 classes with rupees 20,000/- per month.

selection_process: Selection committee of the school as per Govt. norms.
how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.

Apply through a Bio-Data form along with Self Attested EDUCATIONAL QUALIFICATION DOCUMENTS beginning from HSC to Master degree in the above-mentioned subject with having B.Ed. as professional qualification and basic knowledge in computer Application, in the O/O Principal UMA UGHSS on all working days from 7.00am-11.00 am.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 12-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Guest Faculty post?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the Guest Faculty post at Uma UG Higher Secondary School, Boudh is 12th June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the required educational qualification for the Guest Faculty position?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Master's degree in the concerned subject with at least 50% marks and a B.Ed. or equivalent degree recognized by NCTE. Basic computer knowledge is also required.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for retired candidates applying for this post?
faq.answer: Retired candidates can apply for the Guest Faculty post if they are not exceeding the maximum age limit of 65 years.

faq.question: Q4. How will the candidates be selected for the Guest Faculty post?
faq.answer: The selection process will be conducted by the school's selection committee as per Government norms.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary structure for the Guest Faculty position?
faq.answer: The salary is Rs. 400/- per class/lecture of 45 minutes duration, with a monthly ceiling of Rs. 20,000/- for a maximum of 50 classes.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for the Guest Faculty recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process is offline. Candidates need to submit a Bio-Data form along with required documents to the Principal's office.

faq.question: Q8. What documents need to be submitted with the application form?
faq.answer: Self-attested copies of educational qualification documents from HSC to Master's degree, B.Ed. certificate, and proof of basic computer knowledge are required.

faq.question: Q9. Where should the application form be submitted?
faq.answer: The application form should be submitted in the office of the Principal, UMA UGHSS, Boudh.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The job type for the Guest Faculty post is temporary for the academic session 2026-27.
